items.title: Fleet mobility pilot Release
items.description: Release of Fleet mobility pilot improvements aimed at moving Asset availability and Fleet locations live, anchored in employer launch repeatability across markets while keeping service economics under control and led through Pool Bike & Fleet Management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users. The quarter concentrates on multi-country employer launch repeatability, rider conversion quality, and dealer-service economics so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase asset availability by strengthening pool bike & fleet management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

Increase fleet task completion with bikes by strengthening pool bike & fleet management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase fleet locations live by strengthening pool bike & fleet management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Pool Bike & Fleet Management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users.
Released Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring with better operational telemetry and asset visibility.
Released Service Case & Maintenance Orchestration to cover pooled fleet inspections and maintenance scheduling.
Released Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform with fleet utilization, downtime, and task-substitution reporting.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed fleet planning and asset-readiness updates in Fleet Admin Console.
Deployed booking and issue-reporting updates in Fleet User Mobile Experience.

items.title: Employer launch acceleration Release
items.description: Release of Employer launch acceleration improvements aimed at moving Program go-live lead time and Net revenue retention from employer programs, anchored in employer launch repeatability across markets while keeping service economics under control and led through Employer Policy & Program Management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls. The quarter concentrates on multi-country employer launch repeatability, rider conversion quality, and dealer-service economics so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease program go-live lead time by improving employer policy & program management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls and removing avoidable workflow friction.

Increase eligible employee bike adoption by strengthening employer policy & program management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.kpi: Net revenue retention from employer programs
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net revenue retention from employer programs by strengthening employer policy & program management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

Increase employers live on platform by strengthening employer policy & program management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Employer Policy & Program Management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls.
Released Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync with cleaner payroll mapping and eligibility event handling.
Released Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation with clearer employer billing and payroll reconciliation workflows.
Released Enterprise Integration Layer with reusable payroll and HRIS connector patterns for employer onboarding.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed launch workflow updates in Employer Admin Portal.
Deployed rollout and payroll integration updates in Employer Integration API.
Deployed launch-readiness and adoption tracking updates in Employer KPI Cockpit.

items.title: Rider conversion and trust Release
items.description: Release of Rider conversion and trust improvements aimed at moving Quote-to-order conversion and Active riders, anchored in employer launch repeatability across markets while keeping service economics under control and led through Bike Catalog & Recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling. The quarter concentrates on multi-country employer launch repeatability, rider conversion quality, and dealer-service economics so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase quote-to-order conversion by strengthening bike catalog & recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease incident recovery time by improving bike catalog & recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase active riders by strengthening bike catalog & recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Bike Catalog & Recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling.
Released Order Orchestration & Checkout with clearer step sequencing, approval handling, and order-state transparency.
Released Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience with richer status views, document access, and post-order self-service.
Released Communications & Notifications with event-driven reminders and delivery-stage updates.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed rider conversion and order-tracking improvements in iOS App.
Deployed rider conversion and order-tracking improvements in Android App.
Deployed quote and enrollment workflow improvements in Rider Web Experience.
Deployed proactive lifecycle messages in Lifecycle Notifications.
